type_definitions.name: VerifyOutcome
type_definitions.description: Outcome of a verification check. The three target verify functions (verify-latest-track-local, verify-view-freshness-local, verify-catalogue-spec-refs-local) must produce VerifyOutcome::pass() for Phase 0 inputs after this track's changes. Type contract is unchanged; only the infrastructure control-flow logic that constructs the outcome is modified.

type_definitions.name: VerifyFinding
type_definitions.description: A single verification finding. Phase 0 PASS behavior requires that no VerifyFinding of Severity::Error is emitted for absent artifacts when impl-plan.json is absent. Type contract is unchanged; the change is in the infrastructure control-flow that decides whether to construct an error-level VerifyFinding.

type_definitions.name: Severity
type_definitions.description: Severity level for a verification finding (Info / Warning / Error). The Error variant is the gate-failing signal. Phase 0 PASS requires that the infrastructure verify functions do not produce Error-severity findings when artifacts are absent and impl-plan.json is not present. Type contract and variants are unchanged.
